description.ko: 식물학적 우아함과 미래 기술의 매혹적인 융합으로, 빛나는 신경 섬유가 반투명한 꽃잎과 뒤엉켜 디지털 시대 생명의 본질을 재정의합니다.
description.en: A mesmerizing fusion of botanical elegance and futuristic technology, where glowing neural fibers intertwine with translucent petals to redefine the essence of life in a digital age.

prompt: Macro photography of FLORA-9, a bioluminescent digital plant, translucent crystalline petals with embedded glowing circuit patterns, neon cyan and violet neural veins, floating binary data particles, hyper-realistic textures, 8k resolution, cinematic lighting, cybernetic garden setting.
